message:
fix: remove contradictory open_count assertion in label health test

The test asserted open_count == 2 then open_count == 1 on consecutive
lines. With 1 open + 1 closed issue in the fixture, 1 is correct.
Also updates history deep-dive snapshot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
